title: CobblemonXStellaris
description: A datapack to add Cobblemon spawns to your Stellaris universe!
body:
This simple datapack adds **100+** Pokémon spawns across your Stellaris universe. All added mons are themed to their corresponding planets, biomes, and structures. All Pokémon have had an increase in their spawn levels to provide a greater challenge while exploring the galaxy

Worlds Supported:

*   Mercury
*   Venus
*   Moon
*   Mars

A full list of all the Pokémon and their spawn parameters can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xwClKxnkBNLWCj_FqC7vNq41a_rI-sYYZIrk2iFem1w/edit?usp=sharing)

***

**Dependencies**:

*   [Cobblemon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon)
*   [Stellaris](https:/www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stellaris)

**Recommended**:

*   [All The Mons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons)
